skills.name: ai-shifu-content-segmenter
skills.one_liner: Clean transcripts and course docs into stable semantic lesson segments with structure preservation.
skills.description: Cleans noisy transcripts and course documents, then produces stable semantic lesson segments while preserving code, images, and key terminology.
skills.primary_problem: Raw course material is noisy and inconsistent, making lesson generation unstable.

inputs.name: raw_material
inputs.description: Raw transcript or course document text.

inputs.name: chapter_hint
inputs.description: Optional lesson order and granularity hints.

inputs.name: course_profile
inputs.description: Course authoring profile, for example audience level, lesson duration, and assessment style.

inputs.name: delivery_constraints
inputs.description: Delivery constraints, for example platform limits, interaction density, and must-cover topics.

inputs.name: target_language
inputs.description: Requested output language tag (BCP-47 recommended, for example `fr-FR` or `ja-JP`).

inputs.name: bilingual_output
inputs.description: Whether to output bilingual content instead of single-target language content.

inputs.name: term_policy
inputs.description: Terminology policy: `preserve`, `translate`, or `mixed`.

inputs.name: quote_policy
inputs.description: Quote policy: `translate_only` or `original_plus_translation`.

outputs.name: structured_segments_json
outputs.description: Structured segments with source_span and segment_type fields.

outputs.name: preserve_block_index
outputs.description: Index of immutable code, image, and table blocks.

outputs.name: lesson_cut_candidates
outputs.description: Lesson boundary candidates with one core question each.

zh: clean transcript and build lesson segments
preserve code and images before lesson split
semantic segmentation for noisy course material
en: clean transcript and build lesson segments
preserve code and images before lesson split
semantic segmentation for noisy course material

skills.name: ai-shifu-lesson-script-generator
skills.one_liner: Generate runnable lesson-level MarkdownFlow scripts from structured lesson inputs.
skills.description: Generates runnable lesson-level MarkdownFlow teaching prompts from structured lesson segments, with safe interaction logic and stable variable reuse.
skills.primary_problem: Convert structured lesson inputs into runnable, pedagogically coherent MarkdownFlow scripts.

inputs.name: structured_lesson_segments
inputs.description: Preprocessed and segmented lesson data.

inputs.name: teaching_constraints
inputs.description: Constraints for pacing, interactions, and cross-lesson variable strategy.

inputs.name: course_profile
inputs.description: Course authoring profile, for example audience level, lesson duration, and assessment style.

inputs.name: delivery_constraints
inputs.description: Delivery constraints, for example platform limits, interaction density, and must-cover topics.

inputs.name: target_language
inputs.description: Requested output language tag (BCP-47 recommended, for example `fr-FR` or `ja-JP`).

inputs.name: bilingual_output
inputs.description: Whether to output bilingual content instead of single-target language content.

inputs.name: term_policy
inputs.description: Terminology policy: `preserve`, `translate`, or `mixed`.

inputs.name: quote_policy
inputs.description: Quote policy: `translate_only` or `original_plus_translation`.

outputs.name: used_variables
outputs.description: Variable collection and usage map for the lesson.

zh: turn structured segments into teaching prompts
create runnable lesson script from outline
en: turn structured segments into teaching prompts
create runnable lesson script from outline

skills.name: ai-shifu-lesson-script-optimizer
skills.one_liner: Audit and optimize existing MarkdownFlow teaching prompts while preserving runtime stability.
skills.description: Audits and improves existing MarkdownFlow teaching prompts to fix coverage gaps, interaction quality, and variable or syntax stability issues.
skills.primary_problem: Existing scripts can miss source points or contain unstable interactions and variable logic.

inputs.name: existing_mdf_script
inputs.description: Current teaching script to audit and improve.

inputs.name: source_course_material
inputs.description: Source material for coverage and meaning validation.

inputs.name: optimization_constraints
inputs.description: Rules for interaction limits and cross-lesson dependency behavior.

inputs.name: course_profile
inputs.description: Course authoring profile, for example audience level, lesson duration, and assessment style.

inputs.name: delivery_constraints
inputs.description: Delivery constraints, for example platform limits, interaction density, and must-cover topics.

inputs.name: target_language
inputs.description: Requested output language tag (BCP-47 recommended, for example `fr-FR` or `ja-JP`).

inputs.name: bilingual_output
inputs.description: Whether to output bilingual content instead of single-target language content.

inputs.name: term_policy
inputs.description: Terminology policy: `preserve`, `translate`, or `mixed`.

inputs.name: quote_policy
inputs.description: Quote policy: `translate_only` or `original_plus_translation`.

outputs.name: risk_and_issue_report
outputs.description: Risk report covering gaps, drift, interaction, and syntax issues.

outputs.name: change_list
outputs.description: Grouped change list by issue class.

zh: audit and optimize an existing markdownflow script
find missing points against source material
fix variable and syntax risk in teaching prompts
en: audit and optimize an existing markdownflow script
find missing points against source material
fix variable and syntax risk in teaching prompts

skills.name: ai-shifu-transcript-to-lessons
skills.one_liner: Convert transcripts or long documents into lesson-by-lesson MarkdownFlow teaching scripts.
skills.description: Converts long-form transcripts or course documents into lesson-by-lesson MarkdownFlow teaching scripts with stable structure, preserved artifacts, and reusable variables.
skills.primary_problem: Turn noisy source material into stable, runnable lesson scripts at scale.

inputs.name: course_material
inputs.description: Transcript or long-form source document set.

inputs.name: generation_constraints
inputs.description: Persona, pacing, terminology, and lesson-size constraints.

inputs.name: course_profile
inputs.description: Course authoring profile, for example audience level, lesson duration, and assessment style.

inputs.name: delivery_constraints
inputs.description: Delivery constraints, for example platform limits, interaction density, and must-cover topics.

inputs.name: target_language
inputs.description: Requested output language tag (BCP-47 recommended, for example `fr-FR` or `ja-JP`).

inputs.name: bilingual_output
inputs.description: Whether to output bilingual content instead of single-target language content.

inputs.name: term_policy
inputs.description: Terminology policy: `preserve`, `translate`, or `mixed`.

inputs.name: quote_policy
inputs.description: Quote policy: `translate_only` or `original_plus_translation`.

outputs.name: course_index
outputs.description: Lesson map with core questions and source references.

outputs.name: global_variable_table
outputs.description: Global variable definitions and cross-lesson usage map.

zh: turn course docs into markdownflow lessons
build lesson by lesson teaching prompts
en: turn course docs into markdownflow lessons
build lesson by lesson teaching prompts
